resources.string: Many Congratulations on your work anniversary! May you accomplish \nmore successful working years with this organization.
Wishing you a very happy birthday! \nMay all your dreams come true.
The first computer virus, named creeper created in early 1970s. It display messge:Im creeper,catch me if you can! -and it is the reason we have anti virus software today
Saas stands for Software as a Service.Instead of Installing in your computer it allow to access online-like google Docs or Microsoft 365- where updates and maintenance handled by provider
